stemHtml: After a TCAS RA evasion, 'Clear of Conflict' is received. Before you can report to ATC, another aircraft declares urgency. What should you do?

options.a: Return to previous level and interrupt the urgency to report the TCAS event.
options.b: Return to your previous altitude, wait until the urgency ends, then report TCAS RA to ATC.
options.c: Stay at the new altitude and hold until the urgency ends, then report.
options.d: Stay at the new altitude until urgency ends, then advise ATC and request a new clearance.
